project.name: jobsync
project.description: JobSync is a self-hosted, local-first job-search assistant and application tracker. It helps job seekers discover European vacancies (EURES/ESCO) through a Connector/Module integration layer, triage them in a staging pipeline, track applications through a Kanban status workflow, manage a CRM of contacts, recruiters and referrals (Inside Track), receive multi-channel notifications, and exercise GDPR data rights — all driven by spec-first Allium definitions.

nodes.name: Job Application Tracking
nodes.summary: The core domain where users record job applications and move them through a per-user, category-ordered status workflow. Jobs are tracked on a dynamic Kanban board with optimistic locking, status-transition validation, and an append-only status history.

businessRules: Status transitions must be valid per category-ordered + bounded-reopen rules
Optimistic locking via job version field prevents lost updates
Moving into the 'applied' category sets/clears the applied date as a side effect
All queries are scoped to the owning user
crossDomainInteractions: Receives promoted vacancies from Vacancy Discovery & Staging
Receives converted referrals from Inside Track
Links contacts via CRM & Network (JobContact)
Emits events consumed by Notifications

nodes.name: Vacancy Discovery & Staging
nodes.summary: Automated discovery of external vacancies and their triage through a staging pipeline. Scheduled automations search job sources via connectors, dedup and blacklist results, fetch details, AI-match against the user's resume, and stage candidates for the user to dismiss, archive, or promote to real jobs.

businessRules: Discovered vacancies are deduplicated against existing staged vacancies, jobs, and dedup hashes within a window
Blacklisted companies are filtered out before staging
Resume text is PII-redacted before transfer to cloud AI providers
Staged vacancies past the retention window are purged, persisting their dedup hash
crossDomainInteractions: Drives external search through Connector/Module Integration
Promotes staged vacancies into Job Application Tracking
Runs under the scheduler; consecutive failures trigger module degradation
Emits run lifecycle events to Notifications

nodes.name: Connector / Module Integration
nodes.summary: An anti-corruption layer that abstracts external job boards (EURES, Arbeitsagentur, JSearch) and AI providers (Ollama, OpenAI, DeepSeek) behind pluggable Modules. An admin-gated lifecycle activates, deactivates, health-checks, and degrades modules, with a registry reconciled against persisted state.

businessRules: Module activation/deactivation is admin-gated, rate-limited, and audited
Deactivating a module pauses affected automations
Health probes are rate-limited and persisted
The in-memory registry is reconciled with DB activation state on sync
crossDomainInteractions: Provides search and AI capabilities to Vacancy Discovery & Staging
Admin actions gated by Identity, Auth & GDPR
Emits ModuleDeactivated and degradation events to Notifications

nodes.name: CRM & Network
nodes.summary: A lightweight CRM for managing the people behind a job search — contacts, recruiters, interviewers — plus notes, tasks, interviews, and an activity timeline. Persons are aggregates with state-machine lifecycles and GDPR provenance, linkable to jobs and to one another.

businessRules: A person may have at most one primary company
Person state changes are validated by a lifecycle state machine
Auto-created persons are archived when retention expires
Anonymization is terminal and cascades across notes, tasks, job-contacts, and activity
crossDomainInteractions: Links persons to jobs in Job Application Tracking via JobContact
Provides the people graph used by Inside Track referrals
Consent withdrawal and anonymization governed by Identity, Auth & GDPR
Time-based CRM rules run under the scheduler and emit reminders to Notifications

nodes.name: Inside Track (Referrals & Network)
nodes.summary: The referral/tipster (Vitamin-B) domain: a contact tips the user about a vacancy, and the referral advances through its own lifecycle state machine before reifying into a real Job application. PersonConnection maps directed relationships in the user's network for warm-path discovery.

businessRules: Referral status transitions follow a strict graph (open -> engaged -> relayed -> in_review -> converted) validated by isValidReferralTransition
Only 'converted' and 'declined' are terminal; 'stale' is reachable from any working state and revivable
A referral with no activity for stale_after (default 21 days) goes stale via the CRM cron (ReferralGoesStale)
Reification (TipReifiesToJob) creates a Job with applied status in a single transaction
PersonConnection enforces kind/strength validation, ownership of both persons, dedup, and a cap
crossDomainInteractions: Builds on the people graph from CRM & Network
Reifies converted referrals into Job Application Tracking
Stale transitions are driven by the scheduler's CRM cron
GDPR de-identification may decline a stale tip (Identity, Auth & GDPR)

nodes.name: Notifications
nodes.summary: Preference-gated, multi-channel notification dispatch. Domain events are turned into localized, allowlisted messages delivered through in-app, email (SMTP), webhook (HMAC-signed with retries), and web-push channels, with enforced notifications for delivery failures.

businessRules: Notification messages substitute only allowlisted data fields
User preferences gate which notifications are emitted per channel
Webhook delivery retries up to 3 times with 1s/5s/30s backoff and HMAC signing
Delivery failure and endpoint auto-deactivation produce enforced in-app notifications
Webhook payloads are filtered to a safe field allowlist
crossDomainInteractions: Consumes domain events from Job Tracking, CRM, Inside Track, Discovery, and Connector domains
Reminders fired by the scheduler's CRM cron
SMTP/email reused by Identity, Auth & GDPR for deletion confirmations

nodes.name: Identity, Auth & GDPR
nodes.summary: User identity, authentication, admin authorization, and data-rights handling. Covers rate-limited signup/sign-in via NextAuth, tiered admin authorization with audit logging, public API key issuance, privacy settings, PII redaction, and GDPR account-deletion with a grace period and cascade.

businessRules: Signup and sign-in are rate-limited per IP with constant-time delays
Admin actions follow a tiered rule (explicit allowlist, sole-user implicit, fail-closed) and are always audited
Public API keys are returned in plaintext once and stored as SHA-256 hashes
Account deletion runs after a grace period as a FK-safe cascade within a transaction
Free-text and contact PII is redacted before transfer to cloud providers
crossDomainInteractions: Gates admin operations in Connector/Module Integration
Governs consent withdrawal and anonymization in CRM & Network
Exposes Job Application Tracking over the authenticated public API
Sends deletion-confirmation email via Notifications

nodes.name: Add and Track a Job Application
nodes.summary: User manually records a job application and moves it through the status workflow on the Kanban board.

nodes.name: Discover and Stage Vacancies
nodes.summary: A scheduled automation searches external sources, dedups, filters, AI-matches against the resume, and stages candidate vacancies.

nodes.name: Triage and Promote Staged Vacancy
nodes.summary: User reviews staged vacancies in the deck and dismisses, archives, restores, or promotes them into real jobs.

domainMeta.entryPoint: Staging deck UI / stagedVacancy server actions

nodes.name: Manage Connector Module Lifecycle
nodes.summary: An admin activates, deactivates, health-checks, and reconciles connector modules, pausing affected automations on deactivation.

nodes.name: Manage CRM Contact
nodes.summary: User creates and maintains a CRM person, links them to jobs, logs notes/tasks/interviews, and tracks the activity timeline.

nodes.name: Record and Convert a Referral
nodes.summary: User captures an insider/network tip, advances it through the referral lifecycle, and converts it into a Job application.

nodes.name: Expire Stale Referrals
nodes.summary: A periodic CRM rule marks referrals with no activity past stale_after as stale (ReferralGoesStale).

nodes.name: Map a Network Connection
nodes.summary: User links two CRM persons with a directed connection kind and strength to build the network for warm-path discovery.

nodes.name: Dispatch a Notification
nodes.summary: A domain event is turned into a preference-gated, localized notification and delivered across the enabled channels.

nodes.name: User Sign-up and Sign-in
nodes.summary: Rate-limited registration and authentication of users via NextAuth.

nodes.name: GDPR Account Deletion
nodes.summary: User requests deletion; after email confirmation and a grace period the scheduler executes a FK-safe cascade delete with an admin audit record.

domainMeta.entryPoint: deletion request -> confirmation token -> purgeExpiredDeletions cron

nodes.name: Public API Job Access
nodes.summary: External clients authenticate with a public API key and list or create jobs over the rate-limited Open Host Service REST API.

nodes.name: Validate add-job form
nodes.summary: Parses and validates the job submission against the AddJobForm schema.

nodes.name: Create job with related entities
nodes.summary: Creates the Job along with its location, source, and initial status, scoped to the user.

nodes.name: Change job status
nodes.summary: Transitions the job to a new status with validity checks, optimistic locking, and applied-date side effects.

nodes.name: Append status history
nodes.summary: Writes a JobStatusHistory entry recording the transition.

nodes.name: Render Kanban board
nodes.summary: Builds the dynamic Kanban board grouped by per-user status categories and supports reordering.

nodes.name: Search job sources via connector
nodes.summary: Queries configured external sources through the active module connector.

nodes.name: Deduplicate results
nodes.summary: Builds the dedup key set from existing staged vacancies, jobs, and dedup hashes and drops duplicates.

nodes.name: Filter blacklisted companies
nodes.summary: Removes vacancies from companies on the user's blacklist.

nodes.name: Fetch vacancy details
nodes.summary: Fetches full detail for surviving candidates from the source connector.

nodes.name: AI-match against resume
nodes.summary: Builds a PII-scrubbed prompt and runs AI job-to-resume matching, mapping provider errors to outcomes.

nodes.name: Stage matched vacancies
nodes.summary: Maps reference entities and persists matched vacancies as StagedVacancy records.

nodes.name: Finalize automation run
nodes.summary: Records the run result, computes next run time, and triggers consecutive-failure degradation checks.

nodes.name: List staged vacancies
nodes.summary: Returns a paginated staged-vacancy list with status/tab filters and search.

nodes.name: Dismiss, restore, archive or trash
nodes.summary: Applies lifecycle transitions to a staged vacancy.

nodes.name: Apply bulk action
nodes.summary: Applies a bulk lifecycle action across multiple staged vacancies.

nodes.name: Promote to job
nodes.summary: Promotes a staged vacancy into a real Job via the promoter, with data-audit logging.

nodes.name: Retention cleanup
nodes.summary: Deletes staged vacancies past the retention window, persisting their dedup hashes and emitting a completion event.

nodes.name: Load module manifests
nodes.summary: Returns module manifests for a connector type, merging registry state with DB activation and credentials.

nodes.name: Activate module
nodes.summary: Admin-gated, rate-limited, audited activation updating registry and DB state.

nodes.name: Deactivate module
nodes.summary: Deactivates a module, pauses affected automations, and emits a ModuleDeactivated event.

nodes.name: Run health check
nodes.summary: Runs a rate-limited health probe for a module and persists the result.

nodes.name: Sync registry from DB
nodes.summary: Reconciles the in-memory module registry with persisted DB activation state.

nodes.name: Create person
nodes.summary: Creates a CRM Person aggregate with value-object parsing and GDPR provenance fields.

nodes.name: Link person to job
nodes.summary: Adds a job-contact link with optional role after validating role membership and ownership.

nodes.name: Log note or task
nodes.summary: Creates CRM notes and tasks against the person with polymorphic targets.

nodes.name: Schedule interview
nodes.summary: Schedules a CRM interview and emits an InterviewScheduled domain event.

nodes.name: View activity timeline
nodes.summary: Aggregates the person's notes, tasks, interviews, and events into an activity timeline.

nodes.name: Record insider tip
nodes.summary: Creates an insider-tip referral after asserting usable persons and an owned company.

nodes.name: Engage on the tip
nodes.summary: Transitions the referral open -> engaged as the applicant acts on the tip.

nodes.name: Relay and review
nodes.summary: Advances engaged -> relayed -> in_review as the intermediary and target side act, validated by isValidReferralTransition.

nodes.name: Resolve applied status
nodes.summary: Finds the JobStatus id representing 'applied' for the user via a fallback chain of value, category, and ordering lookups.

nodes.name: Commit referral to apply
nodes.summary: Reifies the referral into a Job (TipReifiesToJob): upserts the job title, creates the job + status history in a transaction, and emits an event.

nodes.name: Detect inactive referrals
nodes.summary: Finds referrals whose last activity is older than stale_after (default 21 days) in non-terminal working states.

nodes.name: Transition to stale
nodes.summary: Applies the ReferralGoesStale transition to each inactive referral, guarded by the lifecycle validator.

nodes.name: Aggregate rule results
nodes.summary: runCrmTemporalRules orchestrates all CRM temporal rules in parallel with a re-entrancy guard and logs per-rule failures.

nodes.name: Validate kind and strength
nodes.summary: Validates the connection kind and strength against permitted value objects.

nodes.name: Verify ownership and cap
nodes.summary: Verifies ownership of both persons, dedupes, and enforces the connection cap.

nodes.name: Create connection
nodes.summary: Persists the directed PersonConnection between the two persons.

nodes.name: Resolve user preferences
nodes.summary: Loads and parses the user's notification preferences from UserSettings.

nodes.name: Build localized message
nodes.summary: Builds a localized notification message, substituting only allowlisted data fields.

nodes.name: Deliver across channels
nodes.summary: Delivers through the registered in-app, email, webhook, and push channels per the user's preferences.

nodes.name: Handle delivery failure
nodes.summary: Retries webhook delivery with backoff and writes enforced in-app notifications on failure or auto-deactivation.

nodes.name: Rate-limit by IP
nodes.summary: Checks the signin/signup sliding-window limiter for the client IP, short-circuiting on overflow.

nodes.name: Validate form and credentials
nodes.summary: Validates the signup/signin form and rejects duplicate emails on registration.

nodes.name: Establish session
nodes.summary: Wraps NextAuth signIn to create the authenticated session, with a constant-time delay.

nodes.name: Request deletion token
nodes.summary: Creates a DeletionConfirmationToken and sends a confirmation email with an escaped confirmation URL.

nodes.name: Confirm deletion
nodes.summary: Confirms account deletion via the hashed token and schedules the grace period.

nodes.name: Purge after grace period
nodes.summary: purgeExpiredDeletions executes the cascade for users whose grace period elapsed, writing an admin audit log entry.

nodes.name: Cascade-delete user data
nodes.summary: Deletes all user-owned records in FK-safe dependency order within a transaction.

nodes.name: Authenticate API key
nodes.summary: withApiAuth applies IP and key-level rate limiting, validates the hashed public API key, and handles CORS.

nodes.name: List jobs
nodes.summary: Returns a paginated, filtered list of jobs for the authenticated API key.

nodes.name: Create job
nodes.summary: Creates a job from a validated request body, resolving related reference entities.

nodes.name: Map result to HTTP response
nodes.summary: Converts a typed ActionResult into a NextResponse, inferring the HTTP status from the error code.

edges.description: Discovery drives external job-board search and AI matching through the connector ACL and its active modules.
Staged vacancies are promoted into real Job records.
A converted referral reifies into a Job application via TipReifiesToJob with applied status.
Referrals and PersonConnections build on the CRM people graph (tipster, insider, via person).
JobContact links CRM persons to specific jobs.
Module lifecycle actions are admin-gated and audited by the authorization layer.
Job and status events trigger preference-gated notifications.
CRM cron fires interview and overdue-task reminders through the notification dispatcher.
Account-deletion confirmation emails are sent through the email channel.
GDPR consent withdrawal and anonymization govern CRM person data.
The authenticated public API exposes job data to external clients.
